briefdescription.para: This function looks up the configuration for the given base address, validates the instance pointer, and initializes the hardware instance with the configuration found.

detaileddescription.para: If the configuration is not found, the function sets the instance as not ready and returns an error code.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vcresampler instance to be initialized.
Base address of the device to initialize.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the configuration for the given base address is not found.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the configuration structure for the VCR resampler based on the provided base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function searches the XV_vcresampler_ConfigTable for an entry whose BaseAddress matches the specified BaseAddress. If BaseAddress is zero, the first entry is returned. If a matching configuration is found, a pointer to the configuration structure is returned; otherwise, NULL is returned.

parameterdescription.para: The base address of the VCR resampler instance to look up.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the matching XV_vcresampler_Config structure if found, otherwise NULL.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XV_vcresampler instance with the provided configuration and base address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_vcresampler instance to be initialized.
Pointer to the configuration structure for the XV_vcresampler.
Base address for the hardware instance.

briefdescription.para: Starts the VC resampler hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts the validity of the instance pointer and its readiness, then writes to the control register to start the hardware operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vcresampler instance.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the VC Resampler core has completed its operation.

listitem.para: 0 if the operation is not done.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_vcresampler core is idle.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vcresampler instance.

simplesect.para: Returns 1 if the core is idle, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_vcresampler instance is ready for the next input.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_vcresampler instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is ready for the next input, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function enables auto-restart for the XV_vcresampler instance.
This function disables auto-restart for the XV_vcresampler instance.
This function sets the hardware register width.
This function gets the hardware register width.
This function sets the hardware register height.
This function gets the hardware register height.
This function sets the input video format.

parameterdescription.para: Input video format data to set.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the input video format.
This function sets the output video format.

parameterdescription.para: Output video format data to set.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the output video format.
This function sets the coefficients for the resampler.
This function gets the coefficients for the resampler.
This function enables global interrupts.
This function disables global interrupts.
This function enables specific interrupts.
Disable specific interrupts for the VC Resampler core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the given VC Resampler instance. It reads the current interrupt enable register, clears the bits specified by Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

simplesect.para: The InstancePtr must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Clears specific interrupt(s) for the VC resampler hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified interrupt mask to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) to clear the corresponding interrupt(s) for the VC resampler instance.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask indicating which interrupt(s) to clear.

simplesect.para: The InstancePtr must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt enable register value for the VC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the instance is ready. It then reads and returns the value of the interrupt enable register (IER) from the hardware.

simplesect.para: The current value of the interrupt enable register.

briefdescription.para: XV_vcresampler_InterruptGetStatus - Retrieves the interrupt status of the VC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr :
Pointer to the XV_vcresampler instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.
The current value of the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) for the VC resampler. This function asserts the validity of the instance pointer and its readiness, then reads and returns the interrupt status register value.
